_comment: LLaMA-Factory dataset registration for the burpwn-usage dataset. Copy/merge this into LLaMA-Factory's data/dataset_info.json, OR keep it here and pass `dataset_dir: <abs path to training/finetune>` in the training YAML. The OpenAI `messages` shape (role/content + tool_calls/tool) is read via formatting=sharegpt with the OpenAI tags mapping; tool calls and tool results are handled natively.
